verses.geez:
ወአቀርብ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ አሮንሃ ፡ እኋከ ፡ ወውሉዶ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሡዑ ፡ ሊተ ፡ አሮን ፡
                  ወናደብ ፡ ወአብዩድ ፡ [ወ]እልዓዛር ፡ ወይታማር ።

translations.lxx: And do thou take to thyself both Aaron thy brother, and his sons, even them of the children of Israel; so that Aaron, and Nadab and Abiud, and Eleazar and Ithamar, sons of Aaron, may minister to me.
translations.kjv: And take thou unto thee Aaron thy brother, and his sons with him, from among the children of Israel, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office, even Aaron, Nadab and Abihu, Eleazar and Ithamar, Aaron’s sons.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ ዐራዘ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ለክብር ፡ ወለሡራሔ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make holy apparel for Aaron thy brother, for honour and glory.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make holy garments for Aaron thy brother for glory and for beauty.

verses.geez:
፡ ወአንተ ፡ አይድዕ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡ ጠቢባን ፡ በልብ ፡ እለ ፡ መላእኩ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ መንፈሰ ፡ ዘጥበብ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡
                  ይግበሩ ፡ ለዐራዘ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ ምቅዳስ ፡ በዘቦ ፡ ይቄድስ ፡ ኪያየ ።

translations.lxx: And speak thou to all those who are wise in understanding, whom I have filled with the spirit of wisdom and perception; and they shall make the holy apparel of Aaron for the sanctuary, in which apparel he shall minister to me as priest.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt speak unto all that are wise hearted, whom I have filled with the spirit of wisdom, that they may make Aaron’s garments to consecrate him, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.

verses.geez:
ወዝውእቱ ፡ አልባስ ፡ ዘይገብሩ ፡ መልበስተ ፡ እንግድዓ ፡ ወትብልያ ፡ ዘመቅፈርት ፡ ወጶዴሬ ፡ ወመልበስ[ተ] ፡ ቍጽሮ ፡
                  ድርማንቀ ፡ ዘብእሲ ፡ ዘሐቌ ፡ ወቅናተ ፡ ወትገብሩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ አልባሲሁ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ወለደቁ ፡ በዘይሠውዑ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And these are the garments which they shall make: the breast-plate, and the shoulder-piece, and the full-length robe, and the tunic with a fringe, and the tire, and the girdle; and they shall make holy garments for Aaron and his sons to minister to me as priests.
translations.kjv: And these are the garments which they shall make; a breastplate, and an ephod, and a robe, and a broidered coat, a mitre, and a girdle: and they shall make holy garments for Aaron thy brother, and his sons, that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.

verses.geez: ወእሙንቱ ፡ ይነሥኡ ፡ (ሊተ ፡) ወርቀ ፡ ወያክንተ ፡ ወሜላተ ፡ ወነተ ፡ ወቢሶሰ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall take the gold, and the blue, and the purple, and the scarlet, and the fine linen.
translations.kjv: And they shall take gold, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen.

verses.geez: ወይገብሩ ፡ ትብሌሁ ፡ እምብሶስ ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ግብሩ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ብዑድ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall make the shoulder-piece of fine linen spun, the woven work of the embroiderer.
translations.kjv: And they shall make the ephod of gold, of blue, and of purple, of scarlet, and fine twined linen, with cunning work.

verses.geez:
ክልኤተ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ኤጴሙስ ፡ እለ ፡ ይትላጸቃ ፡ በበይኖን ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አሐቲ ፡ እምክልኤሆሙ ፡ ገጽ ፡ ግብረቶን
                  ።

translations.lxx: It shall have two shoulder-pieces joined together, fastened on the two sides.
translations.kjv: It shall have the two shoulderpieces thereof joined at the two edges thereof; and so it shall be joined together.

verses.geez:
ወእንመተ ፡ ትብላይሆን ፡ በላዕሌሆን ፡ እምግብረቶን ፡ ድሙራተ ፡ ይኩና ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡
                  ፍቱል ፡ ወቢሶስ ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And the woven work of the shoulder-pieces which is upon it, shall be of one piece according to the work, of pure gold and blue and purple, and spun scarlet and fine twined linen.
translations.kjv: And the curious girdle of the ephod, which is upon it, shall be of the same, according to the work thereof; even of gold, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.

verses.geez: ወንሣእ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ እብነ ፡ መረግድ ፡ ወአኅርዎሙ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt take the two stones, the stones of emerald, and thou shalt grave on them the names of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt take two onyx stones, and grave on them the names of the children of Israel:

verses.geez: ስድስቱ ፡ አስማት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፩እብን ፡ ወሰድስቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፩እብን ፡ በበአዝማዲሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: Six names on the first stone, and the other six names on the second stone, according to their births.
translations.kjv: Six of their names on one stone, and the other six names of the rest on the other stone, according to their birth.

verses.geez:
ግበር ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘኬንያ ፡ ኅርወተ ፡ ዐይነ ፡ ማኅተም ፡ ትገልፍ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ እብነ ፡ አስማተ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ።

translations.lxx: It shall be the work of the stone-engraver's art; as the graving of a seal thou shalt engrave the two stones with the names of the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: With the work of an engraver in stone, like the engravings of a signet, shalt thou engrave the two stones with the names of the children of Israel: thou shalt make them to be set in ouches of gold.

verses.geez:
[ወታነብሮሙ ፡ ለ፪አዕባን ፡] ውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ መታክፊሁ ፡ [ተዝካረ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወይነሥእ ፡
                  አሮን ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ፪መታክፊሁ ፡] ተዝካረ ፡ በእንቲአሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put the two stones on the shoulders of the shoulder-piece: they are memorial-stones for the children of Israel: and Aaron shall bear the names of the children of Israel before the Lord on his two shoulders, a memorial for them.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the two stones upon the shoulders of the ephod for stones of memorial unto the children of Israel: and Aaron shall bear their names before the LORD upon his two shoulders for a memorial.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ አራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make circlets of pure gold;
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make ouches of gold;

verses.geez:
ወአግብር ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ጽነፈ ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ድሙረ ፡ ጽጋይ ፡ ግበር ፡ ፅፉረ ፡ ወአንብር ፡ ጽንፈ ፡ ፅፍሮ ፡
                  ዲበ ፡ አራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ በአምሳሊሆን ፡ እመንገለ ፡ ቅድም ።

translations.lxx: and thou shalt make two fringes of pure gold, variegated with flowers, wreathen work; and thou shalt put the wreathen fringes on the circlets, fastening them on their shoulder-pieces in front.
translations.kjv: And two chains of pure gold at the ends; of wreathen work shalt thou make them, and fasten the wreathen chains to the ouches.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ [ሎግዮን ፡ ዘፍትሕ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡ ብዑድ ፡] በሐሳበ ፡ መልበስቱ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ከማሁ ፡ በወርቅ ፡
                  ወበያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ወቢሶስ ፡ ክዑብ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the oracle of judgment, the work of the embroiderer: in keeping with the ephod, thou shalt make it of gold, and blue and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen spun.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the breastplate of judgment with cunning work; after the work of the ephod thou shalt make it; of gold, of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, and of fine twined linen, shalt thou make it.

verses.geez: ትገብሮ ፡ ር[ቡዐ] ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ዐፅፍ ፡ ዘእመት ፡ ኑኁ ፡ ወእመት ፡ ወርዱ ።

translations.lxx: Thou shalt make it square: it shall be double; of a span the length of it, and of a span the breadth.
translations.kjv: Foursquare it shall be being doubled; a span shall be the length thereof, and a span shall be the breadth thereof.

verses.geez:
ወይትአነም ፡ በማእነም ፡ ወለለእብኑ ፡ አርባዕቱ ፡ ጾታሁ ፤ ጾታ ፡ ዘእብን ፡ ይትገበር ፡ ዘስርዲዮን ፡ ወዘትጳዝዮን ፡
                  ወዘመረግድ ፡ አሐዱ ፡ ጾታ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt interweave with it a texture of four rows of stone; there shall be a row of stones, a sardius, a topaz, an emerald, the first row.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt set in it settings of stones, even four rows of stones: the first row shall be a sardius, a topaz, and a carbuncle: this shall be the first row.

verses.geez: [ወካልእ ፡ ጾታ ፡] ዘእብኑ ፡ ከመ ፡ ፍሕም ፡ ወስንፒር ፡ ወኢያስጲስ ።

translations.lxx: And the second row, a carbuncle, a sapphire, and a jasper.
translations.kjv: And the second row shall be an emerald, a sapphire, and a diamond.

verses.geez: ወሣልስ ፡ ጾታ ፡ ዘለጊርዮን ፡ ወአቃጥስ ፡ ወአሜቲሶጥስ ።

translations.lxx: And the third row, a ligure, an agate, an amethyst:
translations.kjv: And the third row a ligure, an agate, and an amethyst.

verses.geez:
ወራብዕ ፡ ጾታ ፡ በእብን ፡ ዘሕብረ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ወብርሌ ፡ ወሳውም ፤ ወልቡጠ ፡ በወርቅ ፡ ወእሱረ ፡ በወርቅ ፡ ይኩን ፡
                  በበጾታሁ ።

translations.lxx: and the fourth row, a chrysolite, and a beryl, and an onyx stone, set round with gold, bound together with gold: let them be according to their row.
translations.kjv: And the fourth row a beryl, and an onyx, and a jasper: they shall be set in gold in their inclosings.

verses.geez:
ወእበኒሁ ፡ ይትገበር ፡ በአስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዐሠርቱ ፡ ወክልኤቱ ፡ በበ ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፤ ይትገለፍ ፡
                  ከመ ፡ ግልፈተ ፡ ዐይነ ፡ ማኅተም ፡ ለለስሙ ፡ ለ፲ወ፪ሕዝበ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And let the stones of the names of the children of Israel be twelve according to their names, engravings as of seals: let them be for the twelve tribes each according to the name.
translations.kjv: And the stones shall be with the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names, like the engravings of a signet; every one with his name shall they be according to the twelve tribes.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ [ለሎግዮን ፡] ጽነፊሁ ፡ ዘፅፍሮ ፡ ወፅፍሮሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዝርዚቅ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make on the oracle woven fringes, a chain-work of pure gold.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make upon the breastplate chains at the ends of wreathen work of pure gold.

verses.geez:
ወይንሣእ ፡ አሮን ፡ አስማቲሆሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡ ቃለ ፡ ፍትሕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እንግድዓሁ ፡
                  እንዘ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ለተዝካር ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.kjv: And thou shalt make upon the breastplate two rings of gold, and shalt put the two rings on the two ends of the breastplate.

verses.geez:
ወታነብር ፡ መንጸረ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡ [ፍትሕ ፡] አዝፋሪሁ ፡ ለስንሳሌሃ ፡ እምኵልሄ ፡ እምስማካቲሃ ፡ ወእምኵናኔ ፡ ታነብር
                  ።

translations.kjv: And thou shalt put the two wreathen chains of gold in the two rings which are on the ends of the breastplate.

verses.geez: ወሥዕለ ፡ አራዊት ፡ ታነብር ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ክልኤሆሙ ፡ መታክፍ ፡ ዘመልበስት ፡ መንገለ ፡ ገጽ ።

translations.kjv: And the other two ends of the two wreathen chains thou shalt fasten in the two ouches, and put them on the shoulderpieces of the ephod before it.

verses.geez:
ወታነብር ፡ መንገለ ፡ ምኵናን ፡ ዘፍትሕ ፡ ትእዛ[ዘ ፡] ወርት[ዐ] ፡ ወይትገበር ፡ ውስተ ፡ እንግድዓሁ ፡ ለአሮን ፡
                  ወሶበ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ያብእ ፡ አሮን ፡ ፍትሖሙ ፡ ለውሉደ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በውስተ ፡
                  እንግድዓሁ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለዘልፍ ።

translations.kjv: And thou shalt make two rings of gold, and thou shalt put them upon the two ends of the breastplate in the border thereof, which is in the side of the ephod inward.

verses.geez: ወትገብር ፡ መልበስተ ፡ ዘጶዴሬ ፡ ዘኵለንታሁ ፡ በያክንት ።

translations.kjv: And two other rings of gold thou shalt make, and shalt put them on the two sides of the ephod underneath, toward the forepart thereof, over against the other coupling thereof, above the curious girdle of the ephod.

verses.geez:
ወአፈ ፡ መልበስቱ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ማእከለ ፡ በዐውደ ፡ አፈ ፡ መልበስቱ ፡ ይትገበር ፡ ግብረ ፡ ማእነም ፡
                  ወድማሬሁ ፡ እንሞ ፡ እምውስቴቱ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይትበተክ ።

translations.kjv: And they shall bind the breastplate by the rings thereof unto the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, that it may be above the curious girdle of the ephod, and that the breastplate be not loosed from the ephod.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ በመልዕልቴሃ ፡ ወመትሕቴሃ ፡ ከመ ፡ ፍርየተ ፡ ሮማን ፡ ዘያክንት ፡ ወሜላት ፡ ወነት ፡ ዘፍትሎ ፡ ወቢሶስ ፡
                  ክዑብ ፡ መትሕተ ፡ መልበስት ፡ ክዑብ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዐውዱ ፡ ወሕብሩ ፡ ሕብረ ፡ ሮማን ፡ ዘወርቅ ፤ ወጸናጽል ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡
                  ለእሉ ፡ በዐውዱ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put the fringes on the oracle of judgment; thou shalt put the wreaths on both sides of the oracle,
translations.kjv: And Aaron shall bear the names of the children of Israel in the breastplate of judgment upon his heart, when he goeth in unto the holy place, for a memorial before the LORD continually.

verses.geez: ወሮማኑ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ወጸናጽሊሆን ፡ ወጽጌሆን ፡ በናሕሰ ፡ መልበስቱ ፡ እምዐውዱ ።

translations.lxx: and thou shalt put the two circlets on both the shoulders of the ephod in front. And thou shalt put the Manifestation and the Truth on the oracle of judgment; and it shall be on the breast of Aaron, when he goes into the holy place before the Lord; and Aaron shall bear the judgments of the children of Israel on his breast before the Lord continually.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put in the breastplate of judgment the Urim and the Thummim; and they shall be upon Aaron’s heart, when he goeth in before the LORD: and Aaron shall bear the judgment of the children of Israel upon his heart before the LORD continually.

verses.geez:
ወይግበር ፡ አሮን ፡ ሶበ ፡ ይሠውዕ ፡ በቃል ፡ ዘይሰማዕ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ወእንዘሂ ፡ ይወፅእ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሙት ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make the full-length tunic all of blue.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make the robe of the ephod all of blue.

verses.geez:
ወትገብር ፡ ቈጽለ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ረቃቀ ፡ እምወርቅ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ወትገብር ፡ ውሰቴቱ ፡ አርአያ ፡ ማኅተም ፡ ቅዱስ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the opening of it shall be in the middle having a fringe round about the opening, the work of the weaver, woven together in the joining of the same piece that it might not be rent.
translations.kjv: And there shall be an hole in the top of it, in the midst thereof: it shall have a binding of woven work round about the hole of it, as it were the hole of an habergeon, that it be not rent.

verses.geez: ወታነብራ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ዘሕብረ ፡ ያክንት ፡ ፍትሎ ፡ ወያነብርዋ ፡ ዲበ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍጽሙ ፡ ለአርዌ ፡ ለትንበር ።

translations.lxx: And under the fringe of the robe below thou shalt make as it were pomegranates of a flowering pomegranate tree, of blue, and purple, and spun scarlet, and fine linen spun, under the fringe of the robe round about: golden pomegranates of the same shape, and bells round about between these.
translations.kjv: And beneath upon the hem of it thou shalt make pomegranates of blue, and of purple, and of scarlet, round about the hem thereof; and bells of gold between them round about:

verses.geez:
ወይኩን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍጽሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወይንሣእ ፡ አሮን ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ለቅዱሳን ፡ እለ ፡ ቀደሱ ፡ ውሉደ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ሀብተ ፡ ቅድስናሆሙ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍጽሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ስጥወ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: A bell by the side of a golden pomegranate, and flower-work on the fringe of the robe round about.
translations.kjv: A golden bell and a pomegranate, a golden bell and a pomegranate, upon the hem of the robe round about.

verses.geez: ወቍጽረተ ፡ ዐራዙ ፡ እምሶ[ቢስ] ፤ ወትገብር ፡ ማዕፈርተ ፡ ዘቢሶስ ፡ ወቅናተ ፡ ዘሕብር ፡ ግብረቱ ።

translations.lxx: And the sound of Aaron shall be audible when he ministers, as he goes into the sanctuary before the Lord, and as he goes out, that he die not.
translations.kjv: And it shall be upon Aaron to minister: and his sound shall be heard when he goeth in unto the holy place before the LORD, and when he cometh out, that he die not.

verses.geez: ወለደቂቀ ፡ አሮን ፡ ትገብር ፡ ሎሙ ፡ አልባሰ ፡ ወቅናታተ ፡ ወማዕፈርታተ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ለክብር ፡ ወለአንክሮ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt make a plate of pure gold, and thou shalt grave on it as the graving of a signet, Holiness of the Lord.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt make a plate of pure gold, and grave upon it, like the engravings of a signet, HOLINESS TO THE LORD.

verses.geez:
ወታለብሶ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ለእኁከ ፡ ወለደቂቁሂ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ወቅብኦሙ ፡ ወአፅኅዶሙ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ወእባርኮሙ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ይሡዑ ፡ ሊተ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt put it on the spun blue cloth, and it shall be on the mitre: it shall be in the front of the mitre.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt put it on a blue lace, that it may be upon the mitre; upon the forefront of the mitre it shall be.

verses.geez:
ወአግብር ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ድርማንቀ ፡ ዘዐጌ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሰውሮሙ ፡ ምኅፋሪሆሙ ፡ ወኀበ ፡ ይከድና ፡ እምሐቌ ፡ እስከ ፡ መናቅእ
                  ፡ ለይኩና ።

translations.lxx: And it shall be on the forehead of Aaron; and Aaron shall bear away the sins of their holy things, all that the children of Israel shall sanctify of every gift of their holy things, and it shall be on the forehead of Aaron continually acceptable for them before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And it shall be upon Aaron’s forehead, that Aaron may bear the iniquity of the holy things, which the children of Israel shall hallow in all their holy gifts; and it shall be always upon his forehead, that they may be accepted before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወከማሁ ፡ ለይልበስ ፡ አሮን ፡ ወደቂቁ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ደብተራ ፡ ዘመርጡል ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ይበውእ ፡ ይሡዕ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዕ ፡ ቤተ ፡ መቅደስ ፡ ወኢያምጽኡ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይሙ[ቱ] ፤ ሕግ ፡ ለዘልፍ ፡ ሎቱ ፡
                  ወለፍሬሁ ፡ እምድኅሬሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the fringes of the garments shall be of fine linen; and thou shalt make a tire of fine linen, and thou shalt make a girdle, the work of the embroiderer.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt embroider the coat of fine linen, and thou shalt make the mitre of fine linen, and thou shalt make the girdle of needlework.
